title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Vadodara office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions:
Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions!
